# INReservationActionType.checkIn

**Case**

A check-in action.

## Declaration

```swift
case checkIn
```

## Discussion

The [doc://com.apple.sirikit/documentation/Intents/INReservationAction/validDuration] property determines the earliest and latest times that the user can check in for their reservation.

## Action Type

- **INReservationActionType.unknown**: An unknown state.
title: INReservationActionType.checkIn
